justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently and accurately interpreted all of the user's temporal preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering a range of suitable options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made several redundant API calls by checking for availability on dates that were not explicitly requested by the user.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative dates or times, leading to a repetitive and ultimately unsuccessful interaction.
